2020 — 2023 · Chennai

BHM Student

2021 — 2023 · Ongoing

2023 · College Flagship

F&B Department Lead

IHM Chennai · Mann-Vasana Food Festival

Led the entire F&B department for IHM Chennai's annual food festival — menu planning, live culinary stations and full execution before guests, judges and faculty.

Prestige Milestone22 March 2023 · International Cricket

All Hospitality — Showspace Volunteer

IND vs AUS · 3rd ODI · M.A. Chidambaram Stadium · BCCI

A landmark on the road. Duty Pass holder at the iconic Chepauk — all-hospitality operations during a live international match. Thousands of guests. Zero margin for error.

BCCIInternational CricketAll Hospitality
🌐
Diplomatic Milestone24–25 March 2023 · G20 India

Technical Team — EMC

G20 India Presidency · 2nd FWG Meeting · Chennai

The highest stage so far. Selected for the EMC Technical Team at the G20 India Presidency — "Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam: One Earth, One Family, One Future."

G20 IndiaEMC TechnicalDiplomatic

BHM Graduated

What I Do

Areas of
Expertise

01

Event Logistics & Operations

End-to-end coordination — vendor management, manpower scheduling, venue setup and real-time problem-solving from first call to final wrap.

02

Hospitality & Guest Relations

VIP management, protocol adherence, luxury hospitality — trained at IHM Chennai and executed at scale across national-level events.

03

Sports & Live Events

International cricket (BCCI), live concerts, artist hospitality — managing thousands of guests in high-pressure, high-visibility environments.

04

Corporate & Government Events

G20 summit, diplomatic gatherings, national conferences — high-security protocols, government coordination and corporate-grade standards.

05

Weddings & Social Events

Multi-day weddings, décor coordination, F&B supervision, vendor management and full timeline execution for celebrations of all sizes.

06

F&B Production & Bar Operations

Menu execution, buffet setup, live stations, bar management — rooted in IHM education with real-world application at every scale.
